description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on the rear facade, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The property includes a private backyard with a wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool, as well as a landscaped front garden bordered by a low fence. The main entrance is set back under a covered area, and the interior is divided into multiple rooms with visible partition walls. The use of white walls, wood accents, and glass creates a clean, contemporary aesthetic. The bungalow is surrounded by a mix of paved and green outdoor spaces, making it ideal for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, a wooden deck, and a backyard pool, featuring clean white walls and wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, and large windows facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, side garden, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, pool, and expansive glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool enclosure, side yard, and the overall flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped rear windows
